title: firecrawl/firecrawl
summary: Firecrawl 是一个用于大规模搜索、抓取和与网页交互的 API。它支持 AI 代理、AI 爬虫、AI 搜索、数据提取、HTML 转 Markdown 等功能，专为 LLM 和 AI 应用设计，提供高效的网络数据提取服务。
summary_en: Firecrawl is an API for searching, scraping, and interacting with the web at scale. It supports AI agents, AI crawling, AI search, data extraction, HTML-to-Markdown conversion, and is designed for LLM and AI applications, providing efficient web data extraction services.
